title: 3 Hot Meme Stocks to Buy in September
text: For a couple of years now, meme stocks have been a wildcard as investors worldwide have seen plenty of challenges. Between the Covid-19 virus and the ensuing economic recession, it's been hard to keep on top of things.

title: Tech Sell-Off: 1 Growth Stock to Buy, and 1 to Sell

title: DoorDash Deploys AI-Driven Solution to Optimize DashMart Supply Chain
text: Aiming to optimize product availability at its DashMart locations, DoorDash will deploy Relex Solutions' artificial intelligence (AI)-driven supply chain planning solution.  The Relex solution will use machine learning (ML) to create forecasts to provide supply chain optimization for these locations, the companies announced Monday (Aug. 29) in a press release.

title: Hackers access DoorDash data, T-Mobile teams up with SpaceX, and eBay buys TCGplayer
text: Hello, hello! We're back with another edition of Week in Review, the newsletter where we quickly break down the top stories to hit TC in the last seven days.

title: DoorDash Data Breach Sees Customer Information Stolen
text: The company says only a small percentage of customers were affected.

title: DoorDash data breach: Some customers and drivers' information accessed
text: DoorDash Inc. on Thursday reported a data breach affecting its customers and delivery workers that stems from a phishing attack on a third-party vendor.

title: DoorDash hit by data breach linked to Twilio hackers
text: Food delivery giant DoorDash has confirmed a data breach that exposed customers' personal information. In a blog post shared with TechCrunch ahead of its publication at market close, DoorDash said malicious hackers stole credentials from employees of a third-party vendor that were then used to gain access to some of DoorDash's internal tools.

title: DoorDash Stands Head and Shoulders Above Competition in Aggregator Ranking
text: When it comes to restaurant and grocery aggregators, DoorDash is winning by a long shot, according to this month's edition of PYMNTS' Provider Ranking of Aggregators.

title: DoorDash is reportedly ending its delivery partnership with Walmart
text: DoorDash is ending its partnership with Walmart after more than four years of delivering the retail giant's products to customers, according to a new report from Business Insider.

title: Missed BBBY? 10 'Meme Stocks' Are Next Gold Mines, Analysts Say
text: Chasing best-known favorites may not be the best way to score on Meme stocks, analysts say. Meme stock ETFs can help.

title: DoorDash partners with Meta to test delivery of Facebook Marketplace items
text: DoorDash has confirmed that it has teamed up with Facebook Marketplace to make that awkward exchange of items with a stranger a bit easier.

title: DoorDash, Uber Eats Add Non-Restaurant Merchants to Drive Sales Amid Inflation

text: These companies kept consumers fed and entertained during the height of the pandemic, but times have changed.

title: 7 Stocks to Watch Following 2022 Layoff News
text: As the market reacts to recent labor reports, there are plenty of stocks to watch for big moves. Tech companies have been bogarting the headlines this year for reasons they probably wouldn't like.

title: Gig economy stocks popped this week after showing strong demand for their services
text: Shares of gig economy companies popped this week as Uber, Lyft, DoorDash and Airbnb posted quarterly reports that showed strong demand.

title: DoorDash (DASH) Reports Q2 Loss, Beats Revenue Estimates
text: DoorDash (DASH) second-quarter 2022 results reflect the negative impacts of drastic research and development and general & administrative expenses cost hikes.

title: DoorDash Takes Sting out of Delivery Costs With Subscription Offering
text: As food prices rise, DoorDash, the United States' leading restaurant aggregator, is doing what it can to keep customers coming back despite the fees and higher menu prices associated with the channel. The company shared in an investor letter Thursday (Aug.

title: Why DoorDash Stock Is At Least 11% Undervalued
text: DoorDash beat expectations and raised guidance despite facing gale force market headwinds. Its culture of customer service and innovation will propel its stock higher.

title: DoorDash's orders and revenues jump in second quarter, but firm posts quarterly loss
text: DoorDash Inc (NYSE:DASH) shares are set to jump as the takeaway food delivery group reported a strong rise in orders but a larger-than-expected loss for the second quarter of the year. Losses came to US$263mln or 72c per share for the June quarter, compared to a loss of US$102mln, or 30c per share a year earlier.

title: Jobs report, DoorDash jumps and more: Friday's 5 things to know
text: Traders and investors will be focused on the most anticipated economic report of the month, the July jobs report that's due out Friday.

title: DoorDash, Inc. (DASH) CEO Tony Xu on Q2 2022 Results Earnings Call Transcript
text: DoorDash, Inc. (NYSE:DASH ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 4, 2022 6:00 PM ET Company Participants Andy Hargreaves - VP, IR Tony Xu - Co-Founder, Chair and CEO Prabir Adarkar - CFO Conference Call Participants Deepak Mathivanan - Wolfe Research Lloyd Walmsley - UBS Youssef Squali - Truist Securities Bernie McTernan - Needham Brian Nowak - Morgan Stanley Eric Sheridan - Goldman Sachs Andrew Boone - JMP Securities Ron Josey - Citi Ross Sandler - Barclays Jason Helfstein - Oppenheimer Douglas Anmuth - JPMorgan Nikhil Devnani - Bernstein Michael McGovern - Bank of America Mark Mahaney - Evercore ISI Operator Good afternoon and thanks welcome to the DoorDash Quarter Two 2022 Earnings Call. All lines have been placed on mute to prevent any background noise.

title: DoorDash lost money in Q2 but investors are still happy
text: DoorDash Inc (NYSE: DASH) is up 15% in extended trading on Thursday even though the food delivery company reported a wider-than-expected loss for its fiscal second quarter. Why is DoorDash stock up after the bell?

title: DoorDash Shares Soar as Q2 Results Smash Expectations
text: The food-delivery service posted better-than-expected results across the board, as consumer demand for food delivery services remained strong.

title: DoorDash hikes annual core growth outlook as delivery demand holds strong
text: (Reuters) -DoorDash Inc raised its annual target for a key industry metric on Thursday, betting that consumers would stick to ordering in even as decades-high inflation and a return to pre-pandemic lifestyles raise concerns around demand.

title: DoorDash beats revenue expectations, stock up 15%
text: DoorDash said the total number of orders it delivered grew 23% year-over-year to 426 million.

title: DoorDash reports larger loss than expected despite record food-delivery orders
text: DoorDash Inc. on Thursday reported continued growth in the second quarter, saying that its food-delivery business remains healthy despite economic uncertainty, but its loss was worse than what Wall Street expected.
